productDisplayName: Fabindia Men Brown Silk Sleeveless Jacket
description: Composition Brown ethnic jacket made of silk, sleeveless, has a nehru collar with full buttoned placket, two pockets on the lower front and a vented hem Fit Regular Wash care Dry clean only This earthy jacket by fabindia for men is perfect for the artsy intellectual. The superior comfort afforded by the silk fabric and comfortable yet fashionable cut makes this a wardrobe essential. Pair this with colourful cotton trousers to go all out and make a colour block statement. For the more conservative, pair it with simple form fitting denims and sandals. Model statistics The product is a size M on a model of height 6' and shoulders 18"
